series_metadata.series_title: Adoption Assistance Connections to Age 21 Program
series_metadata.series_description: Statewide adoption subsidy program for young adults age 18 to 21. Includes application, redetermination, approval, denial, disability, and termination forms. Includes eligibility documents such as adoption, educational, employment, and disability records. Includes parental support related documents such as tax forms, mortgage statements, utility statements, cell phone statements, auto insurance policies, state and federal criminal background checks. Includes task completion checklists and case activity notes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Permanently in program area server
